title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Nami, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Jinbe, Straw Hat Pirates as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damnit! We thought too carelessly that they had run away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maximum speed, straight ahead!! We have to get closer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They can sink a few samural boats,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's not our problem!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: KABOUM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don! Don! Don!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: KABOUM!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is not good, they manage to keep their distance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: All our boats will sink!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Dahaha! We have them now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They can't do anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yari Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aahh! There is a hole in the boat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ah!! The cannons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It looks like something is happen- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps they are victims of ghosts of babies who have persisted at sea...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That would be more peaceful than what is actually hap- pening!! Where do you get that from?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like someone is standing there, who is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: to all of you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Allow me to introduce myself.*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I come from a country at the bottom of the sea called the Ryugu kingdom, the sector of the fishmen.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All over the world, I have caused great harm to my comrades.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not long ago, I received a cup of sake from the straw hat's captain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I am the new recruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: They call me..

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Jinbe, Knight of the Sea!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that you know who I am...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: He is joining the straw hats!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me wish us a Happy Collabora- Tion

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Wahahaha, sorry for the little monologue!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, as promised, I came back alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hemsman of the straw hat pirates JINBE Knight OF THE sea bounty: 438 million Berry

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like I arrived in time for 8the battle!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Jinbe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Jinbe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Boss!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
